trust.heading: Trusted by companies and real-world projects

whatISolve.title: What I solve
whatISolve.subtitle: From first principles to production — architecture that aligns with your business constraints.

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Domain-driven boundaries, clear contracts, and patterns that keep teams shipping as complexity grows.

items.title: SaaS Systems
items.description: Multi-tenant models, billing hooks, and operational tooling built for long-term product velocity.

items.title: Payment Integration
items.description: Secure money movement, reconciliation, and compliance-aware flows across regions and providers.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Latency budgets, caching strategy, and observability so systems stay fast under real load.

howIThink.title: How I think
howIThink.subtitle: A disciplined loop from problem to resilient systems — no unnecessary ceremony.

steps.title: Understand business problem
steps.body: Stakeholders, constraints, and success metrics before touching tech.

steps.title: Design architecture
steps.body: Clear boundaries, interfaces, and evolution paths your team can own.

steps.title: Build scalable systems
steps.body: Pragmatic delivery with testing, CI, and operational guardrails.

steps.title: Optimize for real-world usage
steps.body: Measure, tune, and harden where it matters for users and revenue.

howIThink.operatingBody: Architecture is a product: documented decisions, measurable outcomes, and room for your team to evolve the system without heroics.
bullets: Clear ADRs and diagrams where they reduce risk
SLOs, tracing, and alerts that match user journeys
Security and compliance baked in, not bolted on

featuredProjects.title: Featured projects
featuredProjects.subtitle: Selected work — anonymized where needed. Impact over vanity metrics.

items.title: Multi-tenant B2B SaaS
items.context: Greenfield platform with org isolation, role-based access, and usage-based billing.
items.impact: 40% faster feature cycle via modular domains

items.title: Cross-border payments hub
items.context: Unified orchestration across PSPs with reconciliation and audit trails.
items.impact: Sub-second auth path at peak settlement windows

items.title: Realtime analytics pipeline
items.context: Event ingestion, enrichment, and dashboards for product and finance teams.
items.impact: Same-day insights vs. weekly batch exports

architectureExpertise.title: Architecture expertise
architectureExpertise.subtitle: Depth where systems meet business — not buzzwords for slides.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a software architect and full-stack engineer focused on systems that survive contact with reality — regulation, flaky networks, and teams that grow faster than documentation.
about.p2c: , explicit trade-offs, and architectures your future self will thank you for.
about.p3: I've shipped across fintech and SaaS, partnering with founders and enterprise teams to turn ambitious roadmaps into dependable platforms.
